text: Hearing "I love you" echo in this modern, near-empty space unsettles and intrigues me. The sterile, glass-walled meeting room hints at formality and isolation, but the words introduce warmth—a strange, dissonant comfort. In the vivid, research-themed next room, the energy shifts: here, ideas are alive, bustling, and experimental. Surrounded by curated knowledge and digital noise, I feel both inspired and strangely alienated, pondering the contrast between raw emotion and the clinical pursuit of understanding. I am curious, moved, and a bit lonely all at once.
